title: Service package post: SEO/AEO revision + discovery fixes
summary: The Module 2.7 launch post got a full SEO/AEO pass: tighter title and excerpt, question-form headings, skimmable lists, and internal links. Also fixed: the post was missing from the sitemap, llms.txt, and llms-full.txt.
machine_summary: Rewrote /blog/service-package-from-real-engagement content in D1 (title 56 chars, excerpt 144, question-form H2s, 10 list items, 4 internal links). Added slug to astro.config.mjs blogPages, llms.txt, llms-full.txt.

title: Module 2.7 — Service Package from a Real Engagement
summary: New 60-minute lesson: turn a completed client engagement into a sellable service package with the mine → decide → blueprint → derive practice. Includes copy-paste prompts, quality gates, and an Alice Marketer blog post with the full packaging prompt. Course now: 4 modules, 19 lessons.
machine_summary: Added /modules/2/service-package-from-engagement/ (order 18, capstone bumped to 19) and /start-2-7 course command; module 2 now 7 lessons. Blog post service-package-from-real-engagement (byline Alice Marketer) with full copyable prompt; new cover asset; HelloBar repointed to the lesson.

title: Module 3 capstone — Ship a Real Follow-Up with sigil
summary: New 75-minute hands-on capstone lesson that bridges Modules 0-2 into a real, shippable artifact: a personalized post-event follow-up campaign powered by sigil, an open-source MIT CLI inside Claude Code. Course now: 4 modules, 18 lessons.
machine_summary: Added /modules/3/ship-with-sigil/ — capstone lesson using blacklogos/sigil CLI for a real email send pipeline on Cloudflare Workers, custom /email-rewrite slash command, per-recipient handcrafted sentences. Home and llms.txt updated to 4 modules / 18 lessons.

title: Lesson navigation sidebar + /modules/ hub
summary: Sticky desktop sidebar inside every lesson shows all modules and lessons with current highlighted and a progress bar; mobile collapses to an off-canvas drawer. New /modules/ hub lists every module and lesson (previously 404).
machine_summary: Added LessonSidebar.astro (sticky on desktop, off-canvas drawer on mobile via FAB) integrated into LessonLayout via CSS grid. New /modules/ hub at src/pages/modules/index.astro reads from the content collection. Companion OG page key "modules" added.

title: Google Analytics 4 added alongside Beam
summary: Site now runs both Google Analytics 4 (gtag.js) and Beam Analytics for cross-checked traffic data. GA4 tag is inlined in <head>; no changes to existing Beam tracking.
machine_summary: Added GA4 gtag.js snippet inline in BaseLayout.astro <head>, next to existing Beam tag. No env gating — fires on all environments. Beam unchanged.

title: Hello bar + lesson promo now point at the M3 capstone
summary: The top hello bar and the floating lesson promo banner now drive traffic to the new Module 3 capstone. Storage keys bumped so previously-dismissed visitors see the fresh content.
machine_summary: Updated promo.ts helloBar and lessonBanner targets to /modules/3/ship-with-sigil/. LessonPromoBanner.astro copy refreshed (NEW CAPSTONE badge, sigil highlights, internal CTA). Storage keys: hellobar-m3-sigil-capstone and lesson-promo-m3-sigil-capstone.

title: Author byline links to personal author page
summary: Clicking the author name on a blog post now goes directly to the personal author page (/blog/authors/{slug}/) instead of the hub-with-anchor. JSON-LD Person.author.url updated to match for SEO canonicalization.
machine_summary: src/pages/blog/[slug].astro authorUrl changed from /blog/authors/#{slug} to /blog/authors/{slug}/. JSON-LD BlogPosting.author.url updated automatically via the same variable.

title: CC4.Marketing website launch
summary: Course website with 17 lesson pages, dark mode, Substack subscription, donation support, SEO, and retro-futuristic design.
machine_summary: Initial release of cc4-marketing/site. Astro 5 static site with 3 modules (17 MDX lessons), dark mode, Substack email capture, PayPal/Ko-fi donations, GitHub feedback, JSON-LD SEO, GitHub Pages + Cloudflare deployment.

title: Interactive course release (v1.0.0)
summary: 17 interactive lessons taught inside Claude Code with slash commands. Practice project as a strategist at Markit agency for Planerio (B2B SaaS).
machine_summary: cc4-marketing/cc4.marketing v1.0.0. 17 lessons via slash commands (/start-0-0 through /start-2-6). Markit agency practice project, CM and CF plugins, CLAUDE.md course context.

title: SEO and email capture system (v1.1.0)
summary: Added download page with Google Form email capture, comprehensive SEO meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter Cards, JSON-LD schemas, and social sharing assets.
machine_summary: cc4-marketing/cc4.marketing v1.1.0. Email capture at /download with Google Form integration. Full SEO: meta tags, OG, Twitter Cards, JSON-LD (WebSite, Course, BreadcrumbList). Favicon suite. Secret bonus content.

title: March 2026 course content update
summary: Aligned course with current AI-powered marketing landscape. Updated all lesson content, tools, and examples to reflect 2026 best practices.
machine_summary: cc4-marketing/cc4.marketing v1.2.0. Major content refresh for March 2026. Fixed Planerio positioning/ICP drift across modules, resolved content consistency issues, standardized course-context.json as single source of truth, rewrote README for public release.

title: Centralized config, brand guide, and PR guide
summary: Moved site configuration to siteData.ts, added brand guidelines page and GitHub PR contribution guide, cleaned up unused components.
machine_summary: cc4-marketing/site. Created siteData.ts centralizing nav, modules, features, stats. Added brand-guide.astro and GitHub PR guide lesson. Removed unused email subscription API and navigation components.

title: Content consistency and install step fixes
summary: Fixed lesson counts to 17 across JSON-LD and homepage, corrected Module 0 to 4 lessons, normalized Ko-fi links, fixed SEO title duplication, and updated quickstart steps for Substack flow.
machine_summary: cc4-marketing/site. Corrected lesson count 16/18→17 in JSON-LD and homepage. Module 0 card 3→4 lessons. Normalized Ko-fi URLs. Fixed BaseLayout title template duplication. Updated install steps for Substack subscribe flow.

title: Live changelog with timeline, filters, and agent feeds
summary: Full changelog system: timeline page with version grouping and search, homepage What's New section, lesson update banners, /whats-new Claude Code skill, llms.txt for AI agents, and auto-changelog CI.
machine_summary: cc4-marketing/site. BearlyChange on Cloudflare Workers + KV. /changelog page with timeline, filter pills, search. WhatsNew homepage section. ModuleUpdatesBanner on lesson pages. /whats-new skill. llms.txt and llms-full.txt. Auto-changelog GitHub Actions workflow. RSS and JSON Feed. Keep a Changelog convention with types: added, changed, fixed, deprecated, removed, security.

title: Email subscribe flow revamped
summary: The email subscribe experience has been revamped with a new integration for more reliable delivery.
machine_summary: cc4-marketing/site. Replaced subscribe flow with Resend API integration via Cloudflare Pages Function at /api/subscribe. Branded HTML welcome email with course download link. CORS and error handling included.

title: Blog section with Emdash CMS and Astro 6 upgrade
summary: Launched /blog powered by Emdash CMS on Cloudflare D1. Upgraded from Astro 5 to Astro 6 with @astrojs/cloudflare adapter. Blog features SEO-optimized posts, author pages, structured data, custom OG images, and Substack newsletter CTA. Two launch posts published.
machine_summary: cc4-marketing/site v0.3.0. Astro 5→6 upgrade with @astrojs/cloudflare adapter (server mode). Emdash CMS integration with D1 database and R2 storage. New /blog section with SSR post index and detail pages (PortableText rendering). /blog/authors static page with Person schema. BlogPosting + CollectionPage + AboutPage structured data. Custom og-blog.png OG image. Blog cover illustrations per post. Migrated /api/subscribe from custom worker.js to Astro API route using cloudflare:workers env. Added live.config.ts for Astro Live Collections. Nav updated with Blog link. Sitemap priority 0.9 for blog routes. llms.txt updated with blog section.

title: Typographic OG image engine for all pages
summary: Auto-generated social share cards for every page using a typographic engine (Satori + resvg-wasm on Cloudflare Workers). Blog posts get runtime-rendered cards with author avatar and excerpt; all other pages get build-time cards. Content-hashed URLs enable automatic cache invalidation.
machine_summary: cc4-marketing/site. workers-og Cloudflare Worker using Satori + resvg-wasm. Build-time static OG cards for homepage, blog index, changelog, authors, download, brand-guide, and all 17 module lessons (at /og/pages/{key}.png). Runtime-rendered blog post cards at /og/blog/{slug}-{hash}.png with author circular avatar, post title, and excerpt. R2 cache + content-hashed URLs for automatic invalidation. Dev-only /og-preview UI and /og/debug endpoint. PNG tEXt metadata embeds engine version and generation timestamp.

title: Three new blog posts published
summary: Published three new posts: 'castmd: Vibe Coding a Chrome Extension for LLMs' by Tri Vo on rebuilding a Chrome extension with Claude Code; 'The Last Mile of Shipping Is the Hardest Part' by Tri Vo on turning manual release steps into slash commands; and 'AI Works Best When It Looks at What You've Already Shipped' by Alice on extracting real workflows from shipped work.
machine_summary: cc4-marketing/site. Three posts published to Emdash D1. Slugs: castmd-vibe-coding-chrome-extension (Tri Vo, 2026-04-28), the-last-mile-of-shipping (Tri Vo, 2026-04-20), ai-workflows-not-automation (Alice Marketer, 2026-04-15). All with bespoke 1200x630 cover images, bylines, featured_image set in D1, and entries in llms.txt/llms-full.txt.

title: SEO structured data and meta tag overhaul
summary: Fixed Course schema duplication (now only on homepage), corrected publisher logo dimensions to 180x180, added standalone BreadcrumbList schemas to blog index and lesson pages, fixed blog title tags to stay under 60 chars, expanded homepage and blog descriptions, and updated llms.txt with all 6 blog post URLs.
machine_summary: cc4-marketing/site. BaseLayout: showCourseSchema default false, titleSuffix split (articles get '| CC4M'), publisher logo og-image.png→apple-touch-icon.png (180x180). LessonLayout: 3-level BreadcrumbList (Home→Module N→Lesson), module-enriched title prefix. blog/index.astro: standalone top-level BreadcrumbList script tag. blog/[slug].astro: per-post keywords from title stopword filter, author URL with #anchor for named authors, publisher logo fix. robots.txt: added Google-Extended, Meta-ExternalAgent, Bytespider, cohere-ai. llms.txt + llms-full.txt: all 6 posts listed. sitemap: lastmod added. Homepage description trimmed to 159 chars.

title: AEO: rich result schemas and lesson meta descriptions
summary: Added FAQPage schema to the Claude Code marketing guide and HowTo schema (5 steps) to the campaign brief post, enabling Google rich results for both. Expanded all 17 lesson meta descriptions from 63-101 to 148-160 chars. Rephrased 8 H2 headings as questions across 4 key lessons for featured snippet targeting.
machine_summary: cc4-marketing/site. blog/[slug].astro: slug-keyed extraSchemas map; FAQPage on claude-code-for-marketing-guide-2026 (4 Q&A pairs), HowTo on write-campaign-brief-with-ai (5 steps, totalTime PT10M). All 17 src/content/modules/**/*.mdx description fields expanded to 148-160 chars. Question-form H2 rephrases in 0.0-introduction (2), 1.4-agents (2), 2.1-campaign-brief (2), 2.6-seo-optimization (2).

title: Blog: release highlight box and sticky table of contents
summary: Added Release Highlight Box for product releases with version, download, landing page, and source links. Added auto-generated Sticky Table of Contents from H2 headings with smooth scroll navigation and active section highlighting. Desktop: right sidebar with sticky positioning. Mobile: collapsible drawer.
machine_summary: cc4-marketing/site. src/components/BlogContent.astro: new releaseHighlight block handler, minimal style (left border, tinted bg). src/pages/blog/[slug].astro: H2 extraction from content, TOC generation at build time, desktop sticky sidebar (.blog-toc-sticky, position: sticky top 100px), mobile drawer (.blog-toc-drawer, fixed left -100% sliding to 0), IntersectionObserver for active highlighting, smooth scroll JS. Threadmark post: 7 H2 sections + v0.4.0 release box.

title: Bug fix: TOC anchor links now scroll to sections
summary: Fixed table of contents anchor links not scrolling to target sections. H2 headings rendered by PortableText now have proper id attributes for anchor navigation. Moved ID generation from page template into content renderer.
machine_summary: cc4-marketing/site. src/components/BlogContent.astro: moved H2 detection from [slug].astro into renderer, wrap h2 blocks in <div id={headingId}> to provide anchor targets. Added headingId property to Segment type, slugify() function generates deterministic IDs (lowercase, alphanumeric+hyphens). Fixed smooth scroll navigation and IntersectionObserver active highlighting.
